featured.title: PeakeCoin Local News Feed Added
featured.summary: A lightweight static news feed is now available for websites using the PeakeCoin API repo.
featured.author: PeakeCoin

articles.title: PeakeCoin Local News Feed Added
articles.summary: A lightweight static news feed is now available for websites using the PeakeCoin API repo.
articles.content: Use local_news.js directly in a browser or fetch local_news.json from your frontend. You can show featured posts, render a news list, or filter by category.
articles.author: PeakeCoin

articles.title: Community Events Can Be Added Easily
articles.summary: Add more articles to local_news.json to publish neighborhood updates, events, and announcements.
articles.content: This static format is meant to stay simple so anyone can update it. Add more articles with title, summary, location, and published_at fields to keep your site fresh.
articles.author: PeakeCoin
